message:
style(workspace): apply cargo fmt to fp-conformance + fp-types

Run cargo fmt across fp-conformance and fp-types to clear accumulated
drift from recent live-oracle test additions and the SeriesUnique +
SeriesFactorize wiring fix (24db600). All changes are pure
formatter-output: long method chains wrapped, multi-line assert
argument splits, multi-line error message strings collapsed where they
fit on one line. Tested with cargo check --workspace + spot-checked
fillna live oracle tests; all green.

[bd-frankenpandas-m37i5]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
